ValidationRule.description: ROMANIA - We need to make mandatory all fields under "Acquisitions Offer Request" when Case record has Case Category = Order and deliveries AND Case Detail = Offer. This update should apply to all profiles who manage that section.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordTypeId=='01220000000E0aO', ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Category__c ,'Order and deliveries'), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Detail__c ,'Offer'), OR( ISBLANK( Model__c ),ISBLANK( Trim_level__c ), ISBLANK( Engine_size_cm3__c ), ISBLANK( Body_Type__c ), ISBLANK( Seats__c ), ISBLANK( Ext_Color__c ), ISBLANK( Int_Color__c ), ISBLANK( Qty__c ), ISBLANK( Customer_fleet_size__c ), /*ISBLANK( Additional_info__c ),*/LEN (Options__c) = 0, ISPICKVAL( Make__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Fuel_type__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Offer_Request_Type__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Doors__c , ""), ISPICKVAL( Transmission_type__c , ""),ISPICKVAL( AWD_4WD__c , "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure you have filled in ALL fields in the Acquisitions Offer Request section.
